title: そこは、オーロラの輝き

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since that day at the fast food restaurant, Jordan and I have been
hard at work preparing for the Tracen Meet.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: No... I'm good! I can't let training this basic tire me out.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Graaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've made it to the last day before the Tracen Meet. As I turn to go
home after another day of training, Jordan grabs my arm.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, um... This is gonna sound low-key lame, but like... I don't think
I've ever wanted to win more than I do now.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: B-but... what if I lose? Ahaha... What if, after all that, I still can't—
choice_data_list:
Don't worry. You're not the same runner you
were before.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
choice_data_list: You can win this. I promise.
You can win this. I promise.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Pfft...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You trust me waaay too much, you know that? I mean, I totes
appreciate it, but still!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Finally, the Tracen Meet arrives.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Tosen Jordan's back? Now that I think about it, I remember
seeing her training more lately.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Same here. She seemed to have given up for a while there, though. I
wonder if she'll be able to finish today's race...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With emotions running high, the 2,000-meter turf race begins!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(Come on, girl, just stay calm. Remember your training and... Hey, I'm
doing it! I've got this!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The race is swiftly moving towards the fourth and final corner! Tosen
Jordan's in a good position! Can she maintain her lead?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Uraurararaugh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What's this?! Gold Ship races forward with amazing speed! She's
steadily pulling away from Tosen Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: And everyone in my class is already sooo much better than me. I'm sick of being a cringey loser all the time, but that's what's happening...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (If I lose here... If I lose again...)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (I'll lose my motivation for real this time!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"That desire to win is going to be your greatest weapon."
"You can win this. I promise."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"That desire to win is going to be your greatest weapon."
"You can win this. I promise."

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(Seriously... Always going on and on about how I can win... Why do
you believe in me so much anyway?!)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ugh, fine! Time to show this crowd a real glow-up!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Tosen Jordan?! Tosen Jordan is chasing after Gold Ship, and
gaining on her!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're neck and neck! Will it be Gold Ship?! Tosen Jordan?! Who
will reach the goal first?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: It's Tosen Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Ehehe, this feeling really is the vibe.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm beat... and ready to pop off! I'm talking a facial mask, oil massage,
and a little aromatherapy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That last spurt to first place really got the crowd going. The
2,000-meter turf race ends in a roar of applause.
choice_data_list: That was an amazing race, you know.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I know, I know! Seriously, you stuck on repeat or something? I
could hear you simping during the race too.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So, real talk... With today's race over, doesn't that mean our little
deal together is done too? Just wondering, but... are you training
anybody right now?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: If not, I was thinking... You kinda need a racer to train to keep your job, right? In that case, I suppose I'd be okay being scouted by you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I mean, if that's what you want.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her invitation may be flippant, but I can tell she's serious about the
offer. And, well, I don't have any reason to refuse!
choice_data_list: Of course—I'd love to be your trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... All right, guess that means we're, like... a team for real now.
Looking forward to it, Trainer. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Theeere you areee!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I've been looking aaaall over for you, bluey! How'd you get so
flishy-flashy?! On that track, you were like fwoosh, zoom! Pow! I like
you, gutsy girl!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Say, how about we dig a tunnel all the way to Brazil?! We'll feel the
heat of the Earth's mantle together!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, huh? What are you talking about? You're acting super sus right
now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From that day forward, Gold Ship could frequently be found hovering
around Tosen Jordan... But that's a story for another time.
